# [Lepton Demo] Demo script

## Summary

`docs/demo-script.md` — 5-min script with timestamped narration,
panel-by-panel walkthrough, Q&A, and recording checklist.

## Acceptance

- [x] Cold open, 7 panel walkthroughs with timestamps
- [x] 2 demo questions (BTC restaking + Arc payments)
- [x] Q&A section answering the most likely judge questions
- [x] Failure-mode recovery steps
- [x] Recording checklist (resolution, browser, terminals, mic, 1080p)
